messages.content: Hello! How can I assist you today?
i need help with my order
Of course! Could you please provide me with your order ID or any details related to your order?

Thank you for your patience, Alice! Your order (ORD-12345) has been delivered. It includes:

- 1 item of Product ID: p_001
- 1 item of Product ID: p_008

If you need assistance with anything specific regarding this order, such as a return request or details about the items, please let me know!
i would like to return it
I can help you with that! Before proceeding, could you please let me know the reason for the return?

I'm sorry to hear that your item arrived broken, Alice. I can initiate the return for you.

Just to confirm, you want to return the order (ORD-12345) because it is broken, correct?

Your return has been successfully initiated for order (ORD-12345) due to it being broken. 

If you need any further assistance or have any questions, feel free to ask!
i do need help with another order
Sure! Please provide me with the order ID or any details related to the other order you need help with.

Your order (ORD-999) is currently in processing and has not yet been delivered. It includes:

- 1 item of Product ID: p_005

If you need assistance with anything specific regarding this order, please let me know!
I would like to return it

Unfortunately, returns are only available for delivered orders. Since your order (ORD-999) is still being processed, you won't be able to initiate a return at this time.

If you have any other questions or need further assistance, feel free to let me know!
